heading: Annual notice of tax delinquency
label: 7524 Annual notice of tax delinquency
text: Not less often than annually, the Secretary shall send a written notice to each taxpayer who has a tax delinquent account of the amount of the tax delinquency as of the date of the notice.
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–168, title XII, § 1204(c)110 Stat. 1471July 30, 1996“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall apply to calendar years after 1996.”
